subcodes.first_line: For the span of thirty years did We pay its rent, until We purchased it, and then the Covenant-breakers wrested it from Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قصر مدت سی سال اجاره اش را دادیم تا آنکه خریدیم وناقضین ازما گرفتند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @Shrines and Holy places, @business; financial; property matters, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
